scripts.dev:up: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'for port in 5000 5173 5174; do lsof -tiTCP:$port -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs -r kill; done'
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:up
scripts.dev:status: sh -c 'lsof -iTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null && lsof -iTCP:5000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null && echo "frontend: http://localhost:5173/" && echo "backend: port 5000" || (echo "dev services are not fully running" && exit 1)'
